caption: A man with distinctive spiky, silver-grey hair and glasses is seated in a studio setting, facing a black microphone. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt, gold-colored suspenders, and a patterned tie. Large black headphones are positioned over his ears. In the background, there is a white wall with a framed yellow shield emblem and a banner that reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS". On-screen graphics appear in the lower corners: a logo on the left says "BEST TALK PODCAST" and red text on the right reads "BEST TALK 101". The man remains relatively still across the sequence, maintaining a focused expression and looking slightly downward and to the right. There are very minimal changes in his posture or the surrounding environment, indicating a steady shot of him while he is engaged in a podcast recording session.
